Name: NUST LMS API
Description:
NUST Learning Management System API for developer integrations (Moodle AJAX wrapper).
Authenticate with your NUST LMS credentials via `POST /auth/login` to receive a bearer token, then call any operation with `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. The NustDevKit gateway logs into the LMS on your behalf and manages the underlying session (cookie + sesskey) server-side, so you never handle the ephemeral sesskey.

BearerAuth.Description: Gateway-issued JWT. Obtain it from `POST /auth/login` using your NUST LMS credentials, then send it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. The gateway manages the underlying LMS session (cookie + sesskey) server-side, so the ephemeral sesskey never leaves the gateway.

Endpoints.Name: login
Endpoints.Description: Authenticates against NUST LMS on your behalf and returns a gateway JWT. The LMS session (cookie + sesskey) is created and held server-side; use the returned token as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` for every other operation.
Endpoints.Summary: Log in with NUST LMS credentials

application/json.Description: Bearer token issued by the gateway after a successful login.

Parameters.Name: body
Parameters.Description: NUST LMS credentials.

Endpoints.Name: getCoreRecentCourses
Endpoints.Description:
Returns the courses the authenticated user has accessed most recently, ordered by last access time.
Moodle method: `core_course_get_recent_courses`

200.Name: response200
200.Description: List of recently accessed courses ordered by last access.

application/json.Description: Recently accessed courses ordered by last access time.
Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Response.Name: response
Response.Description: List of recently accessed courses ordered by last access.

Parameters.Name: limit
Parameters.Description: Maximum number of courses to return.

Endpoints.Name: getEnrolledCoursesByTimeline
Endpoints.Description:
Returns all courses the user is enrolled in, filtered by timeline classification and sorted by a chosen field. Supports pagination via offset.
Moodle method: `core_course_get_enrolled_courses_by_timeline_classification`
Endpoints.Summary: Get enrolled courses by timeline classification

application/json.Description: Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Parameters.Name: offset
Parameters.Description: Zero-based pagination offset.

Parameters.Name: limit
Parameters.Description: Maximum number of courses to return.

Parameters.Name: classification
Parameters.Description: Timeline classification filter for enrolled courses.

Parameters.Name: sort
Parameters.Description: Field used to sort enrolled course results.

Endpoints.Name: getCourseContents
Endpoints.Description:
Returns the full content structure of a course — its sections (weeks/topics) and the modules within them (files, folders, pages, URLs, assignments, and other activities), including metadata for each uploaded file. This is the data the course page itself is built from.
Note: file URLs point at Moodle's `pluginfile.php` and require authentication (a webservice token or the active session) to download — the URL alone is not publicly fetchable.
Moodle method: `core_course_get_contents`
Endpoints.Summary: Get all content for a course

200.Name: response200
200.Description: Course sections, each with its modules and their uploaded files.

application/json.Description: The course's sections, in display order.
Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Response.Name: response
Response.Description: Course sections, each with its modules and their uploaded files.

Parameters.Name: courseid
Parameters.Description: ID of the course whose contents to retrieve.

Endpoints.Name: getCalendarEventsByTimesort
Endpoints.Description:
Returns action events (deadlines) across all enrolled courses, ordered by their sort timestamp. On NUST LMS these are submission due dates for assignments, labs, quizzes, and similar dated activities. Use `timesortfrom` to filter to upcoming deadlines only.
Moodle method: `core_calendar_get_action_events_by_timesort`
Endpoints.Summary: Get global calendar action events sorted by time

application/json.Description: A list of calendar events with pagination boundary IDs.
Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Parameters.Name: limitnum
Parameters.Description: Maximum number of events to return (e.g. 20 for one page of results).

Parameters.Name: timesortfrom
Parameters.Description: Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). Only events with a sort time at or after this value are returned. Pass `0` for no lower bound (all upcoming and past events). To see only upcoming deadlines, pass the current epoch time (e.g. the output of `Date.now() / 1000 | 0` in JS or `int(time.time())` in Python).

Parameters.Name: timesortto
Parameters.Description: Only return events with timesort <= this Unix timestamp.

Parameters.Name: aftereventid
Parameters.Description: Return events whose ID is greater than this value (cursor pagination).

Endpoints.Name: getCalendarEventsByCourse
Endpoints.Description:
Returns all action events (deadlines) for a single course — assignment, lab, and quiz submission due dates, and other dated activities.
Moodle method: `core_calendar_get_action_events_by_course`
Endpoints.Summary: Get calendar action events for a specific course

200.Name: response200
200.Description: Calendar events for the specified course.

application/json.Description: A list of calendar events with pagination boundary IDs.
Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Response.Name: response
Response.Description: Calendar events for the specified course.

Parameters.Name: courseid
Parameters.Description: ID of the course to fetch events for.

Parameters.Name: timesortfrom
Parameters.Description: Only return events with timesort >= this Unix timestamp.

Parameters.Name: timesortto
Parameters.Description: Only return events with timesort <= this Unix timestamp.

Parameters.Name: aftereventid
Parameters.Description: Cursor-based pagination — return events after this event ID.

Parameters.Name: limitnum
Parameters.Description: Maximum number of events to return.

Endpoints.Name: fetchNotifications
Endpoints.Description:
Returns pending site-level notifications for the given Moodle context. Returns an empty array when there are no pending notifications.
Moodle method: `core_fetch_notifications`
Endpoints.Summary: Fetch site-level notifications for a context

200.Name: response200
200.Description: Array of site notifications (empty array when none are pending).

application/json.Description: Site-level notifications for the given context; empty array when none are pending.
Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Response.Name: response
Response.Description: Array of site notifications (empty array when none are pending).

Parameters.Name: contextid
Parameters.Description: Moodle context ID for which to fetch notifications. The user context ID can be found in the user profile image URL path segment.

Endpoints.Name: getPopupNotifications
Endpoints.Description:
Returns the most recent popup notifications sent to a user, with support for pagination. Also returns the total count of unread notifications.
Moodle method: `message_popup_get_popup_notifications`
Endpoints.Summary: Get popup notifications for a user

200.Name: response200
200.Description: Popup notifications and total unread count.

application/json.Description: Response envelope for the popup-notifications endpoint.
Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Response.Name: response
Response.Description: Popup notifications and total unread count.

Parameters.Name: useridto
Parameters.Description: ID of the recipient user, passed as a string.

Parameters.Name: limit
Parameters.Description: Maximum number of notifications to return.

Parameters.Name: offset
Parameters.Description: Pagination offset.

EndpointGroups.Name: Authentication
EndpointGroups.Description: Exchange NUST LMS credentials for a gateway bearer token

EndpointGroups.Name: Calendar
EndpointGroups.Description: Calendar operations. On NUST LMS, these "action events" are how deadlines are surfaced — assignment, lab, quiz, and other submission due dates each appear as a calendar event on the day the work must be submitted.

CustomTypes.Name: LoginRequest
CustomTypes.Description: NUST LMS credentials used to obtain a gateway bearer token.

Fields.Name: username
Fields.Description: NUST LMS username.

Fields.Name: password
Fields.Description: NUST LMS password.

CustomTypes.Name: TokenResponse
CustomTypes.Description: Bearer token issued by the gateway after a successful login.

Fields.Name: access_token
Fields.Description: JWT to send as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on subsequent requests.

CustomTypes.Name: CourseTimelineClassification
CustomTypes.Description: Timeline classification filter for enrolled courses.

CustomTypes.Name: CourseTimelineSortField
CustomTypes.Description: Field used to sort enrolled course results.

CustomTypes.Name: MoodleWarning
CustomTypes.Description: A non-fatal warning returned alongside a successful response.

Fields.Name: item
Fields.Description: Item identifier related to the warning; empty string if not applicable.

Fields.Name: itemid
Fields.Description: Numeric item ID related to the warning; 0 if not applicable.

Fields.Name: warningcode
Fields.Description: Machine-readable warning code; empty string if no code.

Fields.Name: message
Fields.Description: Human-readable warning description.

CustomTypes.Name: SiteNotification
CustomTypes.Description: A site-level notification (structure varies by type).

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Unique identifier for the site notification.

Fields.Name: message
Fields.Description: Notification message content.

Fields.Name: type
Fields.Description: Notification type identifier.

CustomTypes.Name: MoodleError
CustomTypes.Description: Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Fields.Name: errorcode
Fields.Description: Machine-readable error code identifier.

Fields.Example: Can't find data record in database table.
Fields.Name: message
Fields.Description: Human-readable error description.

Fields.Name: link
Fields.Description: Redirect URL for the user; empty string if not applicable.

Fields.Name: moreinfourl
Fields.Description: URL to additional error documentation; empty string if not available.

Fields.Name: debuginfo
Fields.Description: Additional debug information; empty string when not in debug mode.

CustomTypes.Name: Course
CustomTypes.Description: An enrolled course.

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Unique course identifier.

Fields.Example: CS-212 Object Oriented Programming BSCS-13 2K23 ABC
Fields.Name: fullname
Fields.Description: Full display name of the course.

Fields.Name: shortname
Fields.Description: Short course code or abbreviated name.

Fields.Name: idnumber
Fields.Description: Institution-assigned course ID number; empty string if not set.

Fields.Name: summary
Fields.Description: HTML summary of the course.

Fields.Name: summaryformat
Fields.Description: Format of the summary field (1 = HTML).

Fields.Name: startdate
Fields.Description: Course start date as Unix timestamp.

Fields.Name: enddate
Fields.Description: Course end date as Unix timestamp. 0 means no end date.

Fields.Name: visible
Fields.Description: Whether the course is visible to enrolled students.

Fields.Example: CS-212 Object Oriented Programming BSCS-13 2K23 ABC
Fields.Name: fullnamedisplay
Fields.Description: Display name of the course (may differ from fullname for context).

Fields.Name: viewurl
Fields.Description: URL to the course page on the LMS portal.

Fields.Name: progress
Fields.Description: Student's completion progress as a percentage.

Fields.Name: hasprogress
Fields.Description: Whether completion tracking is enabled for this course.

Fields.Name: isfavourite
Fields.Description: Whether the user has marked this course as a favourite.

Fields.Name: hidden
Fields.Description: Whether the user has hidden this course from their dashboard.

Fields.Name: showshortname
Fields.Description: Whether the short name is displayed alongside the full name.

Fields.Name: coursecategory
Fields.Description: Name of the category this course belongs to.

CustomTypes.Name: RecentCourseFields
CustomTypes.Description: Additional fields specific to recently accessed courses.

Fields.Name: timeaccess
Fields.Description: Unix timestamp of the user's most recent access to this course.

CustomTypes.Name: RecentCourse
CustomTypes.Description: A recently accessed course, extending Course with the last-access timestamp.

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Unique course identifier.

Fields.Example: CS-212 Object Oriented Programming BSCS-13 2K23 ABC
Fields.Name: fullname
Fields.Description: Full display name of the course.

Fields.Name: shortname
Fields.Description: Short course code or abbreviated name.

Fields.Name: idnumber
Fields.Description: Institution-assigned course ID number; empty string if not set.

Fields.Name: summary
Fields.Description: HTML summary of the course.

Fields.Name: summaryformat
Fields.Description: Format of the summary field (1 = HTML).

Fields.Name: startdate
Fields.Description: Course start date as Unix timestamp.

Fields.Name: enddate
Fields.Description: Course end date as Unix timestamp. 0 means no end date.

Fields.Name: visible
Fields.Description: Whether the course is visible to enrolled students.

Fields.Example: CS-212 Object Oriented Programming BSCS-13 2K23 ABC
Fields.Name: fullnamedisplay
Fields.Description: Display name of the course (may differ from fullname for context).

Fields.Name: viewurl
Fields.Description: URL to the course page on the LMS portal.

Fields.Name: progress
Fields.Description: Student's completion progress as a percentage.

Fields.Name: hasprogress
Fields.Description: Whether completion tracking is enabled for this course.

Fields.Name: isfavourite
Fields.Description: Whether the user has marked this course as a favourite.

Fields.Name: hidden
Fields.Description: Whether the user has hidden this course from their dashboard.

Fields.Name: showshortname
Fields.Description: Whether the short name is displayed alongside the full name.

Fields.Name: coursecategory
Fields.Description: Name of the category this course belongs to.

Fields.Name: timeaccess
Fields.Description: Unix timestamp of the user's most recent access to this course.

CustomTypes.Name: EnrolledCoursesResponse
CustomTypes.Description: Paginated enrolled-courses response.

Fields.Name: courses
Fields.Description: List of enrolled courses for the current page.

Fields.Name: nextoffset
Fields.Description: Offset to pass on the next page request; -1 when no further pages exist.

CustomTypes.Name: CourseContentFile
CustomTypes.Description: A single file (or link) uploaded inside a course module.

Fields.Name: type
Fields.Description: Content type, e.g. 'file' or 'url'.

Fields.Name: filename
Fields.Description: Name of the file (or title of the link).

Fields.Name: filepath
Fields.Description: Folder path within the module; "/" for the module root.

Fields.Name: filesize
Fields.Description: File size in bytes (0 for links).

Fields.Name: fileurl
Fields.Description: Moodle pluginfile.php URL for the content. Downloading the bytes requires authentication (a webservice token or the active session); the URL alone is not publicly fetchable.

Fields.Name: mimetype
Fields.Description: MIME type of the file when applicable.

Fields.Name: timemodified
Fields.Description: Unix timestamp of the last modification.

CustomTypes.Name: CourseModule
CustomTypes.Description: An item on the course page — an activity or resource (file, page, URL, assignment, ...).

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Course module ID (cmid).

Fields.Name: name
Fields.Description: Display name of the module.

Fields.Name: modname
Fields.Description: Module type, e.g. 'resource' (file), 'folder', 'url', 'page', 'label', 'assign', 'quiz', 'forum'.

Fields.Name: modplural
Fields.Description: Human-readable plural label for the module type.

Fields.Name: instance
Fields.Description: Instance ID of the activity within its module type.

Fields.Name: description
Fields.Description: HTML description/intro for the module, when present.

Fields.Name: visible
Fields.Description: Whether the module is visible (1) or hidden (0).

Fields.Name: uservisible
Fields.Description: Whether the module is visible to the current user.

Fields.Name: url
Fields.Description: Link to open the activity/resource, when applicable.

Fields.Name: modicon
Fields.Description: URL of the module's type icon.

Fields.Name: contents
Fields.Description: Uploaded files/links for this module (present for resource/folder modules).

CustomTypes.Name: CourseSection
CustomTypes.Description: A section (week/topic) of the course, containing its modules.

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Section ID.

Fields.Name: name
Fields.Description: Section title (e.g. a week or topic name).

Fields.Name: section
Fields.Description: Zero-based section number within the course.

Fields.Name: visible
Fields.Description: Whether the section is visible (1) or hidden (0).

Fields.Name: summary
Fields.Description: HTML summary shown at the top of the section.

Fields.Name: summaryformat
Fields.Description: Moodle text format of the summary (1 = HTML).

Fields.Name: uservisible
Fields.Description: Whether the section is visible to the current user.

Fields.Name: modules
Fields.Description: The activities and resources in this section.

CustomTypes.Name: EventIcon
CustomTypes.Description: Icon metadata for a calendar event.

Fields.Name: key
Fields.Description: Icon key name used to locate the icon asset.

Fields.Name: component
Fields.Description: Moodle component that owns the icon (e.g., 'assign').

Fields.Name: alttext
Fields.Description: Accessible alt text for the icon image.

CustomTypes.Name: EventSubscription
CustomTypes.Description: Subscription display settings for a calendar event.

Fields.Name: displayeventsource
Fields.Description: Whether to display the event source label on the calendar.

CustomTypes.Name: EventAction
CustomTypes.Description: Primary action button metadata for a calendar event.

Fields.Name: name
Fields.Description: Display label for the primary action button.

Fields.Name: url
Fields.Description: URL the user should navigate to in order to perform the action.

Fields.Name: itemcount
Fields.Description: Number of items associated with this action.

Fields.Name: actionable
Fields.Description: Whether the action can currently be taken by the user.

Fields.Name: showitemcount
Fields.Description: Whether to display the item count alongside the action label.

CustomTypes.Name: CalendarEvent
CustomTypes.Description: A calendar action event. On NUST LMS these represent deadlines — the due date for an assignment, lab, quiz, or other submission tied to a course activity.

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Unique calendar event identifier.

Fields.Name: name
Fields.Description: Display name of the calendar event.

Fields.Name: description
Fields.Description: HTML description body of the event.

Fields.Name: descriptionformat
Fields.Description: Text format of the description (1 = HTML).

Fields.Name: location
Fields.Description: Physical or virtual location of the event; empty string if not specified.

Fields.Name: categoryid
Fields.Description: Course category ID; null if not a category event.

Fields.Name: groupid
Fields.Description: Group ID if the event is group-specific; null otherwise.

Fields.Name: userid
Fields.Description: User ID if the event is user-specific; null otherwise.

Fields.Name: repeatid
Fields.Description: ID of the repeat group for recurring events; null if not recurring.

Fields.Name: eventcount
Fields.Description: Total number of events in the repeat group; null if not applicable.

Fields.Name: component
Fields.Description: Moodle component that created the event (e.g., 'mod_assign').

Fields.Name: modulename
Fields.Description: Short name of the Moodle activity module (e.g., 'assign').

Fields.Name: instance
Fields.Description: The course module instance ID.

Fields.Name: eventtype
Fields.Description: Type of the event (e.g., 'due', 'open', 'close').

Fields.Name: timestart
Fields.Description: Event start time as Unix timestamp.

Fields.Name: timeduration
Fields.Description: Duration in seconds; 0 for point-in-time events.

Fields.Name: timesort
Fields.Description: Sort timestamp used for ordering events.

Fields.Name: visible
Fields.Description: Visibility flag for a calendar event. 1 means the event is visible; 0 means it is hidden.

Fields.Name: timemodified
Fields.Description: Last modification time as Unix timestamp.

Fields.Name: icon
Fields.Description: Icon metadata for a calendar event.

Fields.Name: course
Fields.Description: An enrolled course.

Fields.Name: subscription
Fields.Description: Subscription display settings for a calendar event.

Fields.Name: canedit
Fields.Description: Whether the current user can edit this event.

Fields.Name: candelete
Fields.Description: Whether the current user can delete this event.

Fields.Name: deleteurl
Fields.Description: URL to delete this calendar event.

Fields.Name: editurl
Fields.Description: URL to edit the underlying course module associated with this event.

Fields.Name: viewurl
Fields.Description: URL to view this event on the calendar.

Fields.Name: formattedtime
Fields.Description: HTML-formatted human-readable event time string.

Fields.Name: isactionevent
Fields.Description: Whether this is an action event requiring user interaction.

Fields.Name: iscourseevent
Fields.Description: Whether this event is associated with a specific course.

Fields.Name: iscategoryevent
Fields.Description: Whether this event is associated with a course category.

Fields.Name: groupname
Fields.Description: Name of the group for group-specific events; null otherwise.

Fields.Name: normalisedeventtype
Fields.Description: Normalised event type identifier used for display grouping.

Fields.Name: normalisedeventtypetext
Fields.Description: Human-readable label for the normalised event type.

Fields.Name: action
Fields.Description: Primary action button metadata for a calendar event.

Fields.Name: url
Fields.Description: Direct URL to the course activity associated with this event.

CustomTypes.Name: CalendarEventsResponse
CustomTypes.Description: A list of calendar events with pagination boundary IDs.

Fields.Name: events
Fields.Description: List of calendar action events for the current result set.

Fields.Name: firstid
Fields.Description: Event ID of the first item in the result set.

Fields.Name: lastid
Fields.Description: Event ID of the last item in the result set.

CustomTypes.Name: Notification
CustomTypes.Description: A popup notification message delivered to a user.

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Unique notification identifier.

Fields.Name: useridfrom
Fields.Description: User ID of the sender.

Fields.Name: useridto
Fields.Description: User ID of the recipient.

Fields.Example: CS-101 Introduction to Computing: Lab 3 Submission Deadline
Fields.Name: subject
Fields.Description: Subject line of the notification.

Fields.Example: CS-101 Introduction to Computing: Lab 3 Submission Deadline
Fields.Name: shortenedsubject
Fields.Description: Shortened version of the notification subject for compact display.

Fields.Example: John Doe posted in CS-101 Introduction to Computing...
Fields.Name: text
Fields.Description: Short HTML excerpt of the notification.

Fields.Name: fullmessage
Fields.Description: Full plain-text body of the notification.

Fields.Name: fullmessageformat
Fields.Description: Format identifier for fullmessagehtml (2 = Markdown source).

Fields.Name: fullmessagehtml
Fields.Description: Full HTML body of the notification email.

Fields.Example: John Doe posted in CS-101 Introduction to Computing...
Fields.Name: smallmessage
Fields.Description: Short plain-text preview of the notification.

Fields.Name: contexturl
Fields.Description: URL to the relevant context for this notification (e.g., a forum post).

Fields.Example: Lab Sessional Finalization - (DL - Section D & E)
Fields.Name: contexturlname
Fields.Description: Human-readable label for the context URL link.

Fields.Name: timecreated
Fields.Description: Unix timestamp when the notification was created.

Fields.Name: timecreatedpretty
Fields.Description: Human-readable relative time string (e.g., '19 days ago').

Fields.Name: timeread
Fields.Description: Unix timestamp when the notification was read; null if unread.

Fields.Name: read
Fields.Description: Whether the notification has been read by the recipient.

Fields.Name: deleted
Fields.Description: Whether the notification has been deleted by the recipient.

Fields.Name: iconurl
Fields.Description: URL to the icon image representing the notification source.

Fields.Name: component
Fields.Description: Moodle component that generated the notification (e.g., 'mod_forum').

Fields.Name: eventtype
Fields.Description: Event type within the component that triggered the notification (e.g., 'posts').

Fields.Name: customdata
Fields.Description: JSON-encoded string with additional notification metadata (cmid, instance, discussionid, postid, etc.).

CustomTypes.Name: PopupNotificationsResponse
CustomTypes.Description: Response envelope for the popup-notifications endpoint.

Fields.Name: notifications
Fields.Description: List of popup notifications for the user.

Fields.Name: unreadcount
Fields.Description: Total number of unread notifications for the user.

CustomTypes.Name: GetRecentCoursesRequest
CustomTypes.Description: Request parameters for retrieving recently accessed courses.

Fields.Name: limit
Fields.Description: Maximum number of courses to return.

CustomTypes.Name: GetEnrolledCoursesByTimelineRequest
CustomTypes.Description: Request parameters for retrieving enrolled courses filtered by timeline classification.

Fields.Name: offset
Fields.Description: Zero-based pagination offset.

Fields.Name: limit
Fields.Description: Maximum number of courses to return.

Fields.Name: classification
Fields.Description: Timeline classification filter for enrolled courses.

Fields.Name: sort
Fields.Description: Field used to sort enrolled course results.

CustomTypes.Name: FetchNotificationsRequest
CustomTypes.Description: Request parameters for fetching site-level notifications.

Fields.Name: contextid
Fields.Description: Moodle context ID for which to fetch notifications. The user context ID can be found in the user profile image URL path segment.

CustomTypes.Name: GetCalendarEventsByTimesortRequest
CustomTypes.Description: Request parameters for retrieving calendar action events sorted by time.

Fields.Name: limitnum
Fields.Description: Maximum number of events to return.

Fields.Name: timesortfrom
Fields.Description: Only return events with timesort >= this Unix timestamp. Pass 0 for no lower bound.

Fields.Name: timesortto
Fields.Description: Only return events with timesort <= this Unix timestamp. Optional.

Fields.Name: aftereventid
Fields.Description: Return events whose ID is greater than this value (cursor pagination). Optional.

CustomTypes.Name: GetCalendarEventsByCourseRequest
CustomTypes.Description: Request parameters for retrieving calendar action events for a specific course.

Fields.Name: courseid
Fields.Description: ID of the course to fetch events for.

Fields.Name: timesortfrom
Fields.Description: Only return events with timesort >= this Unix timestamp. Optional.

Fields.Name: timesortto
Fields.Description: Only return events with timesort <= this Unix timestamp. Optional.

Fields.Name: aftereventid
Fields.Description: Cursor-based pagination — return events after this event ID. Optional.

Fields.Name: limitnum
Fields.Description: Maximum number of events to return. Optional.

CustomTypes.Name: GetPopupNotificationsRequest
CustomTypes.Description: Request parameters for retrieving popup notifications for a user.

Fields.Name: useridto
Fields.Description: ID of the recipient user, passed as a string.

Fields.Name: limit
Fields.Description: Maximum number of notifications to return.

Fields.Name: offset
Fields.Description: Pagination offset.

CustomTypes.Name: MoodleError_Error
CustomTypes.Description: Error returned by the LMS on a failed operation.

Fields.Name: errorcode
Fields.Description: Machine-readable error code identifier.

Fields.Example: Can't find data record in database table.
Fields.Name: message
Fields.Description: Human-readable error description.

Fields.Name: link
Fields.Description: Redirect URL for the user; empty string if not applicable.

Fields.Name: moreinfourl
Fields.Description: URL to additional error documentation; empty string if not available.

Fields.Name: debuginfo
Fields.Description: Additional debug information; empty string when not in debug mode.
